Comment: Shown when the entity has no current task.
Wraps all task descriptions. {0} is the task name. Translators can reorder or reword as needed.
Fallback when walking to a building but the behavior type is not recognized. Building name follows.
Fallback when entering a building but the behavior type is not recognized. Building name follows.
Fallback when walking to a position with no entity destination and no recognized behavior.
Shown when eating. Also used for the Hunger need via slot-based buildings.
Shown when drinking. Also used for the Thirst need via slot-based buildings.
Shown when sleeping. Also used for the Sleep need via slot-based buildings.
Shown when bathing. Also used for the WetFur need via slot-based buildings.
Shown when healing. Also used for the Injury need via slot-based buildings (e.g. medical bed).
Prefix before building name when walking to pick up goods. Building name follows.
Prefix before building name when walking to deliver goods. Building name follows.
Prefix before building name when walking to a workplace. Building name follows.
Prefix before building name when walking to a construction site. Building name follows.
Prefix before building name when walking to demolish. Building name follows.
Prefix before building name when walking to harvest/gather/log. Building name follows.
Complete text when walking to a tile position to plant (no entity destination).
Complete text when walking to a sleep position with no building destination.
Prefix before building name when walking to sleep inside a building. Building name follows.
Prefix before building name when walking to eat. Building name follows.
Prefix before building name when walking to drink. Building name follows.
Prefix before building name when walking to an attraction. Building name follows.
Shown when emptying a workshop's output with no active walking executor.
Shown when filling a workshop's input with no active walking executor.
